name: flowmind-ai
description: FlowMind AI - Operational Workflow Intelligence Platform. Consent-based enterprise SaaS for capturing real workflows and converting them into reusable organizational knowledge (SOPs, maps, training).

scripts.dev: echo 'Use specific workspace dev scripts or docker-compose'
scripts.db:control:migrate: cd apps/api-server && npx prisma migrate deploy || echo 'Run after DBs are up, or use migrate dev'
scripts.api:dev: cd apps/api-server && npm run build && ALLOW_DEV_CLIENT_HEADER=true node dist/main.js
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present || npx tsc -p apps/api-server/tsconfig.json --noEmit
